name: hybrid-deliberation-cycle
_comment: Full local+sonnet hybrid cycle per sota_chain_spec Phase 2. Muezzin drives; Seat-3 (conductor) synthesizes between phases. Each phase checkpointed before advancing.

steps.description: Phase 1: gemma (breadth) + qwen (depth) deliberation with SearXNG grounding
Seat-3 synthesis: conductor reads phase-1 outputs, writes sonnet-synthesis.txt. Per FM-10: NOT an automated API call — this is the conductor's independent substrate evaluation before phase 2.
steps.instruction: Read phase-1 verdicts in the OUTPUT_DIR for this question. Write your Seat-3 blind eval (sonnet-blind.txt) and synthesis (sonnet-synthesis.txt) — read the substrate directly, not from the seats' framing. See sota_chain_spec §5 G4'.

steps.description: Phase 2: laguna + granite + nemotron, each with a tool-grounded sonnet verifier (FILTER not override). Verifier appends verifier_filter to each seat's JSON. Serial.
Conductor Phase 3: read phase-2 report + verifier filters. Produce the final verdict, update the roadmap, drive the next cycle question. DO NOT implement — that is the chain's job.
steps.instruction: Read __OUTPUT_DIR__/phase-2-report.json. Synthesize the local verdicts AND their verifier_filter fields. Produce the final ruling. If a new question emerges, write it to a new question file and fire the next muezzin cycle.
